title: The nature of business activity
summary: 9609 AS Business — adding value, factors of production, and the role of business in the economy.
learningObjectives: Define business activity and adding value.
Identify factors of production and their rewards.
Explain the concept of opportunity cost in business decisions.
Describe primary, secondary, and tertiary sectors.

simpleExplanation.title: Why businesses exist
simpleExplanation.summary: Businesses combine inputs to produce outputs customers will pay more for — the difference is added value.
steps: Land, labour, capital, enterprise — factors of production.
Adding value: output worth > cost of inputs.

sections.content: **The nature of business activity** (1.1.1) opens 9609 Paper 1. Use **Cambridge command words** — *define*, *explain*, *analyse* — with **applied examples**.
